calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: (Consolidated with # 441443 and # 441973) Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long CSR# 8620. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-18-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Michael Bonner, Esq. for Plaintiffs, Aristide Cisneros and Shirley Kollmann. also present.
Kamin Kamali, Esq. special appearance for Defendants/Cross Defendant, EJL Investment and Ellen Lescano, also present and with Bernard Leung representing, Coldwell Bankers.
Steven Pollak, Esq. for Defendant/Cross Plaintiff, DRE Enterprises, Inc., present by Clay Duncan.
Mercedes Gavin, Esq. for Defendants/Cross Plaintiffs, Lily Camba and Donald Camba, also present.
No appearance by Defendants, Elliot Jenkins and PWL Chan Corp. sued as Remax.
Parties reached a settlement Terms were read into the record as follows: EJL Enterprises, Inc. and Ellen Lescano settled for $42,500.00, $25,500.00 by cash, due within 14 days, and 3 pymts of $5,000.00 each on 05-31-07, 06-30-07 and 07-31-07, If failed to make pymts, a stipulation for entry of judgment of $30,000.00, 10% interest and attorney's fees of the unpaid balcance.
Parties mutually released each other from all claims, and to be dismissed without prejudice.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, Trial vacated.
Matter is placed on the Dept. 212's Dismissal Calendar at 10 A.M. on Sept. 18, 2007.
